data.content: Re-implementation handoff: rebased branch foolery-18b6-notification-focus onto current main (now includes v0.13.0 + b47bd804 loom-derived state classification). Implementation logic unchanged — focusNotificationBeat / buildNotificationBeatFocusHref classify via builtinProfileDescriptor + workflowStatePhase, force view=queues|active before navigating, fail loudly with FOOLERY NOTIFICATION BEAT FOCUS FAILURE on terminal/fetch failure. Rebase was clean (no conflicts; only 1 commit reapplied). bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run build all pass. 7/7 notification-bell-actions unit tests pass. Pre-existing 3 failures in install-launcher-path.test.ts confirmed environmental (port 3210 held by installed runtime) and reproduce identically on plain main. Playwright-validated against dev server (port 3055, FOOLERY_BACKEND=knots) by mimicking bell click via window.next.router.push: history -> active (foolery-18b6 in implementation) opens detail dialog; history -> queues (foolery-cd5e in ready_for_planning) opens detail dialog; already-on-active regression still opens dialog. New commit 9bf64ef8a81bdc344639bb465af45e1fa5cbc886 pushed force-with-lease to origin/foolery-18b6-notification-focus.
